variant_name: 高令宁 — 前世新婚立威时
trigger: 前世新婚第二日，沈母逼陆姝仪敬茶、意图做平妻时出现；她以极端方式在沈家喜堂上立威。

appearance_delta.face: 面容更年轻饱满，仍有新嫁娘的清艳，但神色被激怒后变得狠厉，眼尾发红，带强烈羞辱感与杀气。
appearance_delta.body: 新婚时期体态最纤细，肩背笔直，动作决绝，仿佛一根绷到极限的弦。
appearance_delta.hair: 新婚高髻更华贵整肃，可保留喜庆簪饰，但因冲突可能略有散乱，形成失控边缘感。
appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 手持碎瓷片抵颈，颈侧见血痕，红与白的对比极强；眼神近乎以命相逼，震慑全场。

costume_override.outfit: 前世新婚妇人礼服，喜庆但端正，不是夸张凤冠霞帔式，而是高门新妇的正式红色装束，适合喜堂敬茶场面。

visual_reference: Ancient Chinese noble bride in a wedding hall, elegant oval face, pale skin, sharp uplifted eyes reddened with fury, black hair in a formal bridal updo with refined red and gold ornaments, slim upright body, Song dynasty inspired aristocratic wedding hanfu in deep crimson and ivory, holding a broken porcelain shard to her own neck, thin blood line on pale skin, fierce defiant expression, red wedding drapery, tea set, ceremonial hall, cinematic dramatic lighting
visual_prompt_negative: modern wedding dress, western veil, fantasy crown, heavy makeup, smiling bride, short hair, armor, comedic expression, gore exaggeration
